CustomField.description: If you want a custom "How to Apply" section on this development's page on the website, enter the pre-app link here. Example: https://dev.affordablehomesnewjersey.com/cooper-tower-pre-application/
CustomField.inlineHelpText: If you want a custom "How to Apply" section on this development's page on the website, enter the pre-app link here. Example: https://dev.affordablehomesnewjersey.com/cooper-tower-pre-application/
CustomField.label: Custom Pre-app Link
